case_title: YUEN SHAN CHU VS. ELLIOT THOMAS HAYES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: LARRY BECKER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER VICKI KONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. SOMEONE OTHER THAN THE DEFENDANT SIGNED CERTIFIED MAIL GREEN CARD. DEFENDANT WAIVES INVALID SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
